text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, and the top star makes her
entrance, boldly pushing past the festive
decorations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, Trainer! A heretofore unseen year is upon
us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty must have drawn it forth like a
magnet. Ah, where are my manners? Happy New
Overlord!
choice_data_list: Do you want some New Year's mochi?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mochi! How timely—I graciously accept.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After we finish eating...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Last year marked my debut, and accordingly from
there, a host of other achievements.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, the world is yet distracted with racers
of the generation before mine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass composed a poem, they whisper. "Sky
frolicked with a cat," they murmur...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But this year, I, too, shall run in the Classics.
Therefore, once spring has passed, I can
challenge them directly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once this new star surpasses them and becomes a
soloist, the cast list will be turned on its head.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heheh! Trainer, let us make this the year the torch is passed to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For all her newfound braggadocio, her goals
haven't changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my job to turn T.M. Opera O into the ultimate
Centurial Overlord, so there's no avoiding the
more experienced runners if we're going to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The previous generation are all very skilled. It
may come back to hurt me if my preparations are
anything less than stupendous.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must act now if I'm to take the torch this year.
But my actions must be grand in scale, something
overlordly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is why I turn to you, Trainer, o brilliant
beautician of mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I need something befitting the Overlord! What is
it? Speak and I will eagerly follow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Something overlordly... What should it be?
choice_data_list:
Being reborn more powerful in a parallel
universe.
A soothing rose bath atop a storied castle.

Broadening our perspective by listening to
public opinion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Reincarnation in another world! Yes, that does
have an "Overlord" ring to it, though I am not
sure why.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is my first time, but I shall attempt to
visualize the events. A top tier opera star is
caught up in an accident and transported to a
completely different world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Where am I? Who am I? Have I... been sent to an unknown realm?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This power swelling from within me... Yes! I have
been reborn as... the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, since I was the Overlord in my past life, to
be the Overlord again doesn't make for much of a
change...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, that matters not! My outlook is as fresh as
the scenery! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although there was no real, dramatic change from
Opera O's reincarnation, I can tell her power has
increased just a little.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, yes! Bathing atop a castle's high tower! That
is a New Year's activity befitting the Overlord if
I've ever heard one!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make it so—to the stage above the clouds!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Looking down at the land below
from a rose bath on high, what could be more
soothing?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just look at the mountains of plastic bags stacked
up around the academy! What garbage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O thoroughly enjoys the bath and seems
completely refreshed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Public opinion? Interesting... Stylishly lending my
ear to their voices is yet another form of beauty,
after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A wonderful suggestion. We should prepare the
stage now! I'll call the event, "New Year, New Me!
Life Wisdom from the Top Opera Star"!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O? I'm thinking about becoming a
stage actor, but I just don't know if it's right for
me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A stage actor is not something you become. It becomes you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thinking is wholly unnecessary! People will flock
to those who naturally exude the aura of a star!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Opera O! I didn't get enough New Year's
money!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then dance, sing, and write autographs at your
next family gathering!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Money will come flying to you, no doubt! A flair
for the dramatic can make anything come true!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She draws her answers out of thin air, yet each
time, they surprisingly hit the mark. Hearing from
all these people seems to have expanded her
horizons.
